meaning: adj.生苔的,青苔状的,古老的
examples: Mossy fibres terminate in the stratum lucidum of area CA3.
The gossip tossed the mossy blossom fossil.
Through verdurous glooms and winding mossy ways.
Eventually mossy rocks give way to dense hedgerows, coloured with foxgloves and buttercups, then a red telephone box.
As the metal and marble get rained on, they become green and mossy and lovely.
